title: DEWALT Extreme Flat Wood Drill Bit 9 Piece Set, Impact Rated, DT70751-QZ
features: For fast and accurate results in hardwood, softwood, lumber, and wood with nails
Ideal for door locks, mortising, electrical and plumbing work
Extra thick and robust steel shank for outstanding durability. 1/4" shank ensures easy and slip-proof clamping
TSTAK compatible to hold all your accessory sets in one place
description: From the manufacturer Dewalt About Us DEWALT is out there on the jobsite learning what works and what doesn’t so we can make it all work better. Every innovation we make is driven by a desire to increase performance, ease of use or productivity. We change a tool because the change makes the tool work better for the professional using it, not just for the sake of change. DEWALT DT70751-QZ Drill Set, Black & Yellow Connectable Case allows multiple sets to be stacked and locked together
